intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current biological presence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are represented by a single, struggling sprout. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable specimen, though it shows signs of severe stress.

inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No evidence of Silver Guest)

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; soil appears undisturbed but devoid of foliage.
plant_audit.P2_P4_Cluster: Contains a single, thin, chlorotic sprout. No evidence of Mexican Mint or Silver Guest.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos leaf present, showing minor necrosis at the tip. White rabbit anchor is present.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, moist, potentially over-saturated. No fungal blooms observed.
biome_observations.anomalies: Eggshell fragments present in the P2/P4 pot as a soil amendment/calcium intervention. White rabbit anchor is stable.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Initial state shows a single green sprout in the black pot and a solitary Pothos leaf in the rabbit pot.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Sprout in the black pot shows signs of postural collapse (wilting).
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Sprout has lost significant turgor pressure; the Pothos leaf remains static but shows persistent tip necrosis.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. The lack of foliage in P1 and the failure of P2/P4 suggest either seed failure or total mortality. The Pothos (P3) is the only surviving specimen, likely suffering from root zone issues given the persistent moisture and lack of growth.
anomalies: Unidentified thin sprout in P2/P4 pot (New Introduction/Volunteer)
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The yellow pot (P1) is effectively a dead zone. The black pot (P2/P4) contains a single, struggling sprout that is failing to thrive, likely due to poor soil conditions or lack of light. The Pothos in P3 is the only stable element, though it is not thriving. The presence of eggshells suggests a failed attempt at nutrient supplementation.
